notes: NAMI NYC Staten Island affiliate program page for Family Support Group schedules. Cover image is an official asset from the Joan & Alan Bernikow JCC of Staten Island website (same host venue as the Wednesday meetings at 1466 Victory Blvd), downloaded and re-hosted via POST /api/ingest/upload.
missingOrUncertain: Two recurring in-person locations are published (Holy Rosary Parish Center, 85 Jerome Avenue, and JCC, 1466 Victory Boulevard); confirm room numbers and holiday cancellations on namistatenisland.org/calendar before attending.

ClassScout neighborhood is set to Westerleigh to match the 10314 ZIP commonly associated with the JCC Victory Boulevard address; the Tuesday Jerome Avenue site is in a different north-shore area—use NAMI’s calendar for the session you plan to join.
Meetings are for adult family members and loved ones per NAMI’s model; not a drop-in playgroup for young children.

document.name: NAMI NYC Staten Island — Family Support Group
document.description:
Free, confidential NAMI Family Support Group meetings on Staten Island for adults who care about someone who has experienced symptoms of a mental health condition. The NAMI NYC Staten Island page describes a structured, peer-led model (typically 60–90 minutes) led by trained family members, with no endorsement of specific medical therapies.

Published recurring in-person options on the same page include: Tuesdays 6:30–9:00 p.m. at Holy Rosary Parish Center, 85 Jerome Avenue, Staten Island, NY; Wednesdays 11:00 a.m. at the JCC of Staten Island, 1466 Victory Boulevard, Staten Island, NY (noted as currently running); and Wednesdays 6:30–9:00 p.m. at the same JCC address. The page directs visitors to the affiliate calendar and program interest form for the latest schedule.

Sources: https://namistatenisland.org/support-and-education/support-groups/nami-family-support-group/ https://namistatenisland.org/
